children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 1 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency.

children.heading: Community water system
children.label: 2 Community water system
children.text: The term “community water system” has the meaning given the term in .section 300f of title 42

children.heading: Federal credit instrument
children.label: 3 Federal credit instrument
children.text: The term “Federal credit instrument” means a secured loan or loan guarantee authorized to be made available under this chapter with respect to a project.

children.heading: Investment-grade rating
children.label: 4 Investment-grade rating
children.text: The term “investment-grade rating” means a rating of BBB minus, Baa3, bbb minus, BBB (low), or higher assigned by a rating agency to project obligations.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “lender” means any non-Federal qualified institutional buyer (as defined in section 230.144A(a) of title 17, Code of Federal Regulations (or a successor regulation), known as Rule 144A(a) of the Securities and Exchange Commission and issued under the Securities Act of 1933 ( et seq.)).15 U.S.C. 77a

children.label: i
children.text: a qualified retirement plan (as defined in ) that is a qualified institutional buyer; andsection 4974(c) of title 26

children.label: ii
children.text: a governmental plan (as defined in ) that is a qualified institutional buyer.section 414(d) of title 26

children.heading: Loan guarantee
children.label: 6 Loan guarantee
children.text: The term “loan guarantee” means any guarantee or other pledge by the Secretary or the Administrator to pay all or part of the principal of, and interest on, a loan or other debt obligation issued by an obligor and funded by a lender.

children.heading: Obligor
children.label: 7 Obligor
children.text: The term “obligor” means an eligible entity that is primarily liable for payment of the principal of, or interest on, a Federal credit instrument.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “project obligation” means any note, bond, debenture, or other debt obligation issued by an obligor in connection with the financing of a project.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: B Exclusion
children.text: The term “project obligation” does not include a Federal credit instrument.

children.heading: Rating agency
children.label: 9 Rating agency
children.text: The term “rating agency” means a credit rating agency registered with the Securities and Exchange Commission as a nationally recognized statistical rating organization (as defined in ).section 78c(a) of title 15

children.heading: Secured loan
children.label: 10 Secured loan
children.text: The term “secured loan” means a direct loan or other debt obligation issued by an obligor and funded by the Secretary or Administrator, as applicable, in connection with the financing of a project under .section 3908 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a State;

children.label: B
children.text: the District of Columbia;

children.label: C
children.text: the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico; and

children.label: D
children.text: any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: State infrastructure financing authority
children.label: 12 State infrastructure financing authority
children.text: The term “State infrastructure financing authority” means the State entity established or designated by the Governor of a State to receive a capitalization grant provided by, or otherwise carry out the requirements of, title VI of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act ( et. seq.) or .33 U.S.C. 13811section 300j–12 of title 42So in original. The period probably should not appear.1

children.heading: Subsidy amount
children.label: 13 Subsidy amount
children.text: The term “subsidy amount” means the amount of budget authority sufficient to cover the estimated long-term cost to the Federal Government of a Federal credit instrument, as calculated on a net present value basis, excluding administrative costs and any incidental effects on governmental receipts or outlays in accordance with the Federal Credit Reform Act of 1990 ( et seq.).2 U.S.C. 661

children.heading: Substantial completion
children.label: 14 Substantial completion
children.text: The term “substantial completion”, with respect to a project, means the earliest date on which a project is considered to perform the functions for which the project is designed.

children.heading: Treatment works
children.label: 15 Treatment works
children.text: The term “treatment works” has the meaning given the term in section 212 of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act ().33 U.S.C. 1292
